name: THE FARMER
agenda_raw: One Agora Stack is adjacent to two Wilds Stacks.

name: THE PLUNDERER
agenda_raw: Four or more Stacks are Wastes, and Technology Relationship is 10 or more.

name: THE REGULATOR
agenda_raw: The number of Agora Stacks is even (0 is even).

name: THE PHILANTHROPIST
agenda_raw: Five or more Stacks are Agora.

name: THE CONSERVATIONIST
agenda_raw: Four or more Stacks are Wilds, and Cybernation level is four or more.

name: THE FUTURIST
agenda_raw: There are ten or less Feedback tokens in the Bag.

name: THE INDUSTRIALIST
agenda_raw: Four or more Stacks are Works, and Cybernation level is 4 or more.

name: THE DISRUPTOR
agenda_raw: Two or more Disruption cards are on the Goal track.

name: THE ARCHITECT
agenda_raw: All Middle Stacks are in the same State.

name: THE PILOT
agenda_raw: There is at least one path connecting two Outer Stacks.

name: THE NIHILIST
agenda_raw: The group's Victory Condition is not achieved.

name: THE COMMUNITY WORKER
agenda_raw: Three or more Stacks are Agora, and People Relationship is 10 or more.

name: THE DICTATOR
agenda_raw: You are the First player, and People Relationship is 2 or less.
